# Wordle Race

> Race your friends on the same Wordle. No password — pick a username, get a public profile, create a room, share the link, and keep score across games.

## How it works
- Pick a username. You're recognized anywhere just by typing it again — no password, no signup.
- Create a room at `/@<username>/<room-name>` and share the link to invite friends.
- Everyone races the same secret word; first to solve it wins.
- Each room keeps a running scoreboard across rounds, and every player has a public profile of lifetime stats and past games.

## Key URLs
- Profile + lifetime stats: `/@<username>` (e.g. `/@yan`)
- Game room: `/@<username>/<room-name>` (e.g. `/@yan/friday-night`)
- Profile data (machine-readable JSON): `/api/user/<username>`

## Site
- Home: https://wordul.com
- Sitemap: https://wordul.com/sitemap.xml
